description: Dim headlights should map to charging/battery-related diagnosis in current dataset.
No-crank primary symptom should rank starter motor fault first.
Slow crank should favor battery replacement/weak battery path.
Starting click symptom maps to battery-related fault in current rules.

input: clicking sound when key is turned
description: Key-turn clicking maps to starter motor failure in current rules.
Door lock symptom should favor door lock actuator.
Door clicking distinguishes actuator from starting faults.
Overheating is ambiguous and should return cooling-related candidate faults, not final diagnosis.

input: engine overheating and temperature gauge in red zone
description: Overheating plus red temperature gauge should favor engine cooling system.

input: coolant leak near front of engine
description: Coolant leak near front of engine should favor water pump.
Pulling to one side should favor brake caliper.
Spongy pedal is ambiguous across booster, master cylinder, and shoe/drum candidates.
Squealing brakes should favor brake pad.

input: brake pedal pulsation and steering wheel vibration
description: Brake pulsation plus steering vibration should favor brake rotor.
No cold air from vents should favor AC compressor.

input: musty odor from vents and reduced airflow from vents
description: Musty odor plus reduced airflow should favor cabin air filter.
Transmission slipping is ambiguous between transmission-related faults.

input: clutch pedal feels loose and difficulty engaging gears
description: Loose clutch pedal plus difficulty engaging gears should favor clutch cable.

input: engine misfires and poor fuel economy
description: Misfire plus poor fuel economy should rank overlapping engine/fuel/ignition faults.
Unknown symptom should return no diagnosis and ask for a clearer primary symptom.
